title: senecio bartlettii
intro: Senecio bartlettii, also known as Bartlett's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Senecio bartlettii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the body's natural healing processes.
